 PlcGeometryplot_3D.plot_cube (shifted_origin, side_lenght, fate, ax)
 Functions definition ##########################################.
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.plot_dist (C, L, V, r, ax)

Variables

 PlcGeometryplot_3D.parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.type
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.str
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.help
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.args = parser.parse_args()
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.catalog = open( args.Geometry_cat , "r" )
 Read Input ###################################################.
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.lines = catalog.readlines()
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.N_cubes = int( lines[0].split()[3] )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.Cube_side_lenght = np.array( lines[4].split()[3:] ).astype( float )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.IPD = float( lines[6].split()[3] )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.rstart = float( lines[1].split()[3] )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.rstop = float( lines[1].split()[4] )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.Plc_vertex = np.array( lines[2].split()[3:] ).astype( float )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.Plc_direction = np.array( lines[3].split()[3:] ).astype( float )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.Aperture_angle = float( lines[5].split()[3] )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.replication_origin = np.asarray( replication_origin )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.rmin = np.asarray( rmin )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.rmax = np.asarray( rmax )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.fate = np.asarray( fate )
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.fig = plt.figure(figsize=(12, 9), dpi=800)
 Make Plot ###################################################.
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.ax = fig.add_subplot(221, projection='3d')
 First Plot ############################.
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.fill
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.labelsize
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.N_r
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.N_phi
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.wspace
 Save Plot ########################.
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.hspace
 
 PlcGeometryplot_3D.name = args.Geometry_cat.split('.')[1]
